symbols.vision_description: A stylized decorative letter 'R' (or 'B') formed by a tower-like structure with a flag on top and a horizontal bar. The curved interior contains scattered dots, a six-pointed star, a small horseshoe shape, two tiny stick figures, and a circle with a cross/plus sign inside it (resembling a wheel or target).

A circular illustration containing multiple elements: a sun with rays in the upper left, a face/owl-like figure at the top, a vertical post or tree trunk in the center, scattered dots resembling stars, a pine/fir tree on the lower left, a small human figure, and a deer-like animal in the lower center. The style resembles a folk art or tribal drawing depicting a natural scene or world view within a circular frame.
A drawing of three stick figures (one alone, then two together) with a small circle-and-dot symbol above the rightmost figure, and a four-legged animal (resembling a dog) below them.

A hand-drawn sketch showing a flag on a pole on the left side, with several small stick-figure-like or human-shaped figures and circles in the upper right and bottom right, all enclosed within a rough irregular outline resembling a shield or cartouche.

Hand-drawn sketch showing a shovel on the left, a small human figure and circular symbols in the upper right, and a circular seal-like emblem with cross/swastika pattern in the lower center. The drawing appears to be a pictographic illustration, possibly archaic or runic in style.
Hand-drawn illustration of a cup or vessel with a handle on the right, containing a small circle, two small stick figures, and hatching marks inside, with small tick marks along the rim.
Simple line drawing of a stylized animal or figure with a round head, curved back, and short legs, sitting or standing on a horizontal line that resembles a fence rail with small vertical posts.
Hand-drawn sketch of a mouse or rodent-like animal with a rounded body, head with eyes and whiskers, and visible legs.
Simple line drawing of a four-legged animal (resembling a sheep or cow) with a face on the left and wavy lines on its body suggesting wool or texture, with legs visible at the bottom.
A roughly drawn circular outline with an empty interior, appearing hand-drawn or stamped, with some small irregular marks near the top edge of the circle.
A simple line drawing showing a rounded dome or hill shape with a flat or slightly curved base, with several small tick-like marks or tufts on the upper left side of the curve.
A simple black outline drawing of a bottle or flask with a narrow neck and a wider, rounded body, rendered in an illustrative cartoon style.
Hand-drawn sketch of a stick figure with a round head containing simple facial features (two eyes and a mouth) and a thin elongated body/neck extending downward, set against a speckled background.
A hand-drawn simple line illustration of a human face showing two eyes, a nose, and a mouth within an oval face shape
Simple line drawing of a house or hut with a triangular peaked roof and rectangular body, containing three dots vertically arranged inside.
Seal script character resembling an inverted U-shape with two thick vertical strokes that curve inward and meet at the bottom, similar to the seal form of 山 (mountain) or the 凵 radical.

Decorative blackletter/old-style print glyph, appears to be a stylized letter (possibly T or a decorative initial) with thick vertical stroke, horizontal bars, and ornamental flourishes with dot-like details.
A simple black outline of a circle, unfilled, with no internal markings or decorations.
A circle containing a cross/plus sign in its center, with small dot-like marks on the crossbar tips.
Circular seal enclosing a cross/plus shape; the horizontal arms of the cross bear small downward tick marks, and the vertical stroke extends below the circle ending in a small dot or terminal mark.
A hand-drawn, roughly circular oval shape with uneven stroke width, accompanied by partial fragmented lines at the edges of the crop.
Handwritten oval or circle resembling the letter 'O' or digit '0', drawn with a slightly irregular pen stroke.
Handwritten oval/circular shape resembling the digit 0 or letter O, with a rounded closed loop, positioned between two partial character fragments.

A simple stick figure drawing with a rounded dome or umbrella-like shape covering the upper body, with several dots scattered above the figure, possibly representing rain falling on a person under an umbrella or shelter.
Handwritten stenographic-like glyph consisting of a circular loop with an upward-extending stem and a small dot to the right, plus a separate vertical line on the far left edge.
A simple stick-figure-like human drawing with a small circular head, a torso with curved lines suggesting outstretched arms, and legs extending downward. Surrounded by scattered dots.
Bilaterally symmetric ornate character in seal script style, with thick rounded strokes forming interlocking curved lines within a roughly circular frame.
